message:
test: Add grapheme edge case and placeholder behavior tests

- Add test_render_emoji_produces_placeholder to confirm that render_to()
  without a grapheme pool results in placeholder IDs (pool_id 0) for
  multi-codepoint graphemes. Documents the intentional API design.
- Add test_grapheme_info_clamping to verify byte_len clamping to u8::MAX
  for very long graphemes (300 combining accents) and width clamping for
  large tab widths.

Both tests pass and document existing behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
